turns.content: Help me plan my week. I have a dentist appointment Tuesday, need to finish the API redesign by Thursday, and want to prep for the team retrospective on Friday.

📋 SUMMARY: Weekly planning for Feb 12-15 with three key commitments.

Here's a structured plan for your week, Jm:

**Tuesday (Feb 12)**
- Dentist appointment — block travel time before/after
- Light work day around the appointment
- Good day for S0 (boredom blocks) during any waiting

**Wednesday (Feb 13)**
- Deep focus day for API redesign — this is your buffer day
- Use S1 (Pomodoro sessions) to push through the bulk of the work
- Aim for API redesign to be ~80% complete by end of day

**Thursday (Feb 14)**
- Finish and ship API redesign
- Code review / final testing in the morning
- Afternoon: start gathering retro notes while the week is fresh

**Friday (Feb 15)**
- Morning: finalize retro prep (wins, blockers, action items)
- Team retrospective
- Weekly review — good time to check lead measure progress

**Strategy alignment opportunities this week:**
- S3 (Community Events) — any events Tue evening or after work this week?
- S6 (Morning Stretch) — currently at 0%, could start a 10-min routine each morning this week as a small win
- S5 (Alignment Hour) — Wed or Thu evening could work if you protect the time

Want me to put any of this on your calendar, or break down the API redesign into specific tasks?

🗣️ Kaya: Three commitments this week — dentist Tuesday, API Thursday, retro Friday. Buffer day Wednesday.
